query:
ALTER TABLE enrollments 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dateOfBirth VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalXP INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS currentStreak INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS longestStreak INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastCheckInDate VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS photoUrl TEXT;
